signals.headline: Solana's Drift Protocol confirms $280M hack on April 1, 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana's Drift Protocol confirms $280M hack on April 1, 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Solana-based DeFi platform Drift Protocol was hacked via social engineering on a multisig wallet, with $280M stolen (including wrapped BTC, Jito, Fartcoin, stablecoins); team suspended functions, updated security, and is tracking funds with experts/law enforcement—this is one of the largest crypto hacks.[2]
